events.title: Creative Corner
events.description: Process based, hands-on discovery of 2D and 3D art media using spinning paint, colorful clays, and more. Free with admission or membership.

events.description: Playful exploration of scientific concepts and phenomena using handmade catapults, gooey slime, and more. Free with admission or membership.

events.title: Happy Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) Heritage Month! The Seattle Aquarium welcomes you to learn about, appreciate and celebrate
events.description: Happy Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) Heritage Month! The Seattle Aquarium welcomes you to learn about, appreciate and celebrate the experiences and culture of AAPI communities.
